title: Repair vehicle composite material components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair vehicle composite material components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair vehicle composite material component

pcs.text: Use workplace instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Access and interpret fibreglass and composite material repair information is accessed and interpreted from workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications1.3 Identify, select and inspect composite materials for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Check work area with approved ventilation for required operation and report faults to authorised personnel1.6 Identify composite tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) and check for serviceability1.7 Prepare work area and plan work to identify methods for repairing a vehicle using composite materials and to minimise waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use workplace instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Access and interpret fibreglass and composite material repair information is accessed and interpreted from workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications1.3 Identify, select and inspect composite materials for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Check work area with approved ventilation for required operation and report faults to authorised personnel1.6 Identify composite tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) and check for serviceability1.7 Prepare work area and plan work to identify methods for repairing a vehicle using composite materials and to minimise waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use workplace instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Access and interpret fibreglass and composite material repair information is accessed and interpreted from workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications1.3 Identify, select and inspect composite materials for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Check work area with approved ventilation for required operation and report faults to authorised personnel1.6 Identify composite tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) and check for serviceability1.7 Prepare work area and plan work to identify methods for repairing a vehicle using composite materials and to minimise waste.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair vehicle composite material component

elements.title: Carry out repair activities

pcs.text: Locate items to be repaired and assess damage or faults to determine repair methods2.2 Set up tools and equipment and mix and prepare materials for use2.3 Carry out repairs to composite material components according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Apply reinforcement techniques to reinstate pre-damage strength to composite materials2.5 Apply finishing techniques to present composite surfaces to manufacturer and workplace quality standards2.6 Complete repairs to composite material components without causing damage to equipment and components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate items to be repaired and assess damage or faults to determine repair methods2.2 Set up tools and equipment and mix and prepare materials for use2.3 Carry out repairs to composite material components according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Apply reinforcement techniques to reinstate pre-damage strength to composite materials2.5 Apply finishing techniques to present composite surfaces to manufacturer and workplace quality standards2.6 Complete repairs to composite material components without causing damage to equipment and components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate items to be repaired and assess damage or faults to determine repair methods2.2 Set up tools and equipment and mix and prepare materials for use2.3 Carry out repairs to composite material components according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Apply reinforcement techniques to reinstate pre-damage strength to composite materials2.5 Apply finishing techniques to present composite surfaces to manufacturer and workplace quality standards2.6 Complete repairs to composite material components without causing damage to equipment and components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out repair activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
